values.10: RIMCAS Arrival / Departure Wrong Runway Alert (WRA)
values.11: RIMCAS Arrival / Departure Opposite Traffic Alert (OTA)
values.40: Aircraft Not Moving despite ATC Clearance (NOMOV)
values.41: Aircraft leaving/entering the aerodrome area without proper handover (NOH)

I060.title: Safety Net Function and System Status

values.0: Conflict not predicted to occur in military airspace
values.1: Conflict predicted to occur in military airspace

values.0: Conflict not predicted to occur in civil airspace
values.1: Conflict predicted to occur in civil airspace

values.0: Aircraft are not fast diverging laterally at current time
values.1: Aircraft are fast diverging laterally at current time

values.0: Aircraft are not fast diverging vertically at current time
values.1: Aircraft are fast diverging vertically at current time

values.0: Aircraft have not crossed at starting time of conflict
values.1: Aircraft have crossed at starting time of conflict

values.0: Aircraft are not diverging at starting time of conflict
values.1: Aircraft are diverging at starting time of conflict
